summary:
Claim: Helmet cells are characteristic of anemia of spherocytosis.  
Evidence: - Helmet cells result from reduced surface area-to-volume ratio due to loss of cytoplasmic material, a hallmark of spherocytosis. - This morphology arises from defective red blood cell membrane stability, distinct from other anemias like hemolytic uremic syndrome (HUS) or acanthocytosis syndromes.  
Answer: C

Answer: C. Answer choice: C
